best_bpb_note: phase-0 v3, 16KB corpus. Apples-to-oranges with phase 5's 76KB corpus.
best_bpb_phase5_note: HYP4. Now confirmed unreproducible at current realistic system load (~135s/ep vs HYP4's 92s/ep). Treat 0.168 ± 5% as the realistic baseline.
current_hypothesis: phase 11 HYP74 — d96 baseline + adaptive cosine = 239-ep cosine schedule (4× longer than HYP71's fixed 60-ep). Cosine length is the proven lever (HYP69/71). HYP71 used old int(budget/240)=60-ep formula; adaptive measures ~55s/ep → 239-ep cosine over same 240min. Tests if 4× longer annealing on identical d96/corpus pushes strict past 38. Predict: ≥38, maybe 39-40 if longer anneal helps.

last_result_hyp73.verdict: REVERT (definitive: capacity is NOT the lever)
last_result_hyp73.vs_baseline: strict -2 vs HYP61's 39, -1 vs HYP71's 38; any-hit 46 (WORSE than 49); bpb 0.0420 BEST
last_result_hyp73.note: DEFINITIVE NEGATIVE: d128 got best memorization (bpb 0.0420) but WORSE generalization (any-hit 49→46, soul 13→12) = classic overfit. strict-39 ceiling is CORPUS-bound not capacity-bound. Scaling params overfits 152KB corpus. Adaptive-cosine infra KEPT (general improvement). Next: corpus QUALITY (synthetic multi-turn dialogues).

phase11_lesson: Capacity scaling (d128/1.3M) and corpus quantity (+6%) both fail to break strict-39. Phase 11 real lever = corpus QUALITY: synthetic multi-turn dialogues, more diverse paraphrases, better held-out generalization signal. Not more params, not more raw text.

last_result_hyp72.note: Cosine (150-ep) ended at ep 150, bpb plateaued 0.0422 (vs HYP71 d96 0.0428 — marginal), then 5h idle at lr=0. Killed at ep 240 to stop CPU waste (Ryan frugality directive) + fix cosine-budget mismatch. d128 only got 150-ep effective training, not a fair capacity test. Relaunched as HYP73 with adaptive cosine.

phase11_baseline_active: v0.3.3.0-phase11-corpus (HYP71): strict 38, any-hit 49, bpb 0.0428. Filtered corpus (2098 chunks, no leetcode) + 60-ep cosine. Deployed in web_chat. Within TCR band (38 ≥ 34). Carries interview §10-13 + clarity knowledge that HYP61 lacked.

last_result_hyp71.vs_baseline: -1 strict vs HYP61's 39, but +33% corpus knowledge; best phase 11 result; any-hit 49 matches baseline
last_result_hyp71.lever: expected_epochs divisor 360→240 (60-ep cosine on filtered corpus)
last_result_hyp71.note: Cosine length confirmed as lever: 60-ep gave +5 strict (33→38) over 40-ep HYP70 on identical corpus. Deployed v0.3.3.0-phase11-corpus.

last_result_hyp70.note: Filter alone didn't help — cosine length is real lever (HYP69 60-ep gave +4 strict). HYP71 decouples cosine from budget.

last_result_hyp69.vs_baseline: -2 strict vs HYP61's 39; +4 strict vs HYP68's 33; +9% bpb vs baseline
last_result_hyp69.note: More compute helped recover 4 of 6 lost strict. Cosine schedule ends at ep 60 then plateau. Phase 11 ceiling not compute-bound. HYP70 tries corpus filter.

last_result_hyp68.note: New tokens from leetcode-cpp-cheatsheet.md C++ keywords dilute persona signal. HYP69 tries more compute, HYP70 will try selective filter.

last_result_hyp67.note: Smaller batch hurts at small-data scale too — stochastic noise > regularization benefit. All phase 10 'scale' directions exhausted, ceiling locked. Phase 11 = corpus expansion.

last_result_hyp66.note: Llama2 large-batch logic doesn't transfer to 803K/143KB scale. Pivoting opposite direction in HYP67.

last_result_hyp65.vs_baseline: -6 strict vs HYP61's 39 (undertrained, 5 layers @ 120 ep < 4 layers @ 240+)
last_result_hyp65.note: scale-up undertrained, HYP55 lesson repeats. Architecture-up lever exhausted.

last_result_hyp64.note: wd lever proven wrong family (HYP63 bpb +8%, HYP64 -4 strict). Pivoting to architecture: num_layers 4→5 as HYP65.

last_result_hyp63.note: killed before eval; wd 0.05 over-regularized memorization. Try softer 0.03 as HYP64.

last_result_hyp62.hypothesis: HYP62 — cosine LR floor 0.01%→0.001% (3rd decade). Test if compound continues.
last_result_hyp62.verdict: REVERT-PLATEAU — eval IDENTICAL to HYP61. Strict 39, strong 49, all per-cat same. 3rd decade hit FP precision floor (lr = 2e-8 is below numpy float32 effective precision for accumulator). Cosine floor lever is exhausted; 2 decades (HYP60+61) was the limit. Restored HYP61 baseline weights since eval same but HYP61 has cleaner config. Lesson: compound levers eventually hit physical/precision limits.
lessons: 3 decades of cosine floor lower exhausts the lever. lr=2e-8 = below FP precision for AdamW accumulator. No incremental gain.
Compound levers (HYP60→61→62) follow: +1pp, +1pp, +0pp. Plateaus at physical/precision limit not learning limit.
Phase 10 final ceiling: strict 39 (HYP60+61) / strong 49-50 / multi 20-21% / bpb 0.04. v0.3.2.0-cosine-floor-deeper is the canonical phase 10 baseline.
Next levers (HYP63+) must come from different family: dropout, label smoothing, RoPE, BPE tokenizer, or phase 11 corpus scale.

phase10_final_ceiling: strict 39 / strong 49 / multi 21% / bpb 0.04 — HYP60+61 cosine floor lever exhausted at FP precision

last_result_hyp61.hypothesis: HYP61 — cosine LR floor 0.1%→0.01% (another decade lower). Test compound vs HYP60's +1pp.
last_result_hyp61.verdict: KEEP-STRONG — ★★ NEW PHASE 10 STRICT HIGH AGAIN at 39/51 (+1 vs HYP60 38). Strong 49 same. Topic 12→13 (+1). Persona/Extended/Soul same. Compound works — 2 decades of cosine floor lowering each gave +1pp strict. From HYP57's 37 baseline, HYP60+HYP61 added +2pp by lowering floor 100×. Multi-turn eval running bg.

eval_summary.single_turn_strict: 39/51 (76.5%) ★★ NEW HIGH — Persona 2/5, Extended 9/10, Topic 13/16 (+1), Soul 15/20.
eval_summary.multi_turn_v2: 30/150 (20.0%) — same as HYP60. Per-cat redistribution: D.Identity 33.3% (NEW BEST), F.Workflow 26.7%, H.Aqua 26.7%, G.Soul 20% (HYP60 26.7% -6.7), I.Toccata 6.7%, J.Routine 13.3%.

lessons: Cosine floor decade lowering COMPOUNDS at this scale. Each 10× lower → +1pp strict. HYP60 (0.001) +1; HYP61 (0.0001) +1 more.
Phase 10 ceiling kept moving every time we test the assumption. From HYP44B 'capacity bound at 37' to HYP60/61 'just schedule bound'.
HYP62 candidate: another decade (0.00001). Or stop here and explore other levers (label smoothing, dropout) since multiplicative-decade lowering may hit floating-point precision floor.

best_baseline_label_active: v0.3.2.0-cosine-floor-deeper (803K params, vocab 4212, corpus 2017, strict 39 ★★ NEW HIGH / strong 49)

last_result_hyp60.hypothesis: HYP60 — cosine LR floor 1%→0.1% peak. 1-line on top of HYP57 baseline.
last_result_hyp60.verdict: KEEP-STRONG — **NEW PHASE 10 STRICT HIGH at 38/51 (+1 vs HYP57 37)**. Strong 49 (same). Extended 9/10 (+1 BEST), Soul 15/20 (+1 BEST), Topic 12 (same), Persona 2 (-1 minor). Cosine floor decade lower (0.00002→0.000002) gave model another ~10pp lr decay at very-late stage, model squeezed last bit of fine-tune. ★ First phase 10 model to BEAT HYP44B-era strict 37 line.

eval_summary.single_turn_strict: 38/51 (74.5%) ★ NEW HIGH — Persona 2/5, Extended 9/10 BEST, Topic 12/16, Soul 15/20 BEST.
eval_summary.multi_turn_v2: 30/150 (20.0%) — 3rd best phase 10 (HYP44B 21.3% top, HYP52 20.7%). +1.3pp vs HYP57 18.7%. Per-cat: H.Aqua 33.3% (NEW BEST), G.Soul 26.7% (+13.3 vs HYP57), D.Identity 26.7%, E.Relationship 33.3%, A.Kaspa 20%, F.Workflow 20%, B.Whisper 6.7%, C.nami-lm 13.3%, I.Toccata 6.7%, J.Routine 13.3%.

lessons: 1-line cosine floor change (max(lr, lr*0.01)→max(lr, lr*0.001)) gave +1pp strict. Even at converged plateau, deeper decay produced marginal-but-real gain.
Same arch + same corpus + same budget + 1 lever change = first frontier-beat since HYP44B cosine fix. Single-axis levers can compound.
Phase 10 ceiling slightly higher than thought: strict 37 was a soft ceiling, real one is 38+ with careful schedule tuning.

best_baseline_label_active: v0.3.1.9-cosine-floor (803K params, vocab 4212, corpus 2017, strict 38 ★ NEW HIGH / strong 49)

last_result_hyp59.hypothesis: HYP59 — retrain on HYP58 corpus (2069 chunks, +20 deep multi-turn dialogues × 3-turn × 4 weak categories). Same arch + budget.
last_result_hyp59.verdict: REVERT — strict 31/51 (-6pp vs HYP57 37, EXCEEDS 5pp absolute cap). Strong 48 (-1pp within cap). +20 dialogues at weight 5.0 crowded out single-turn anchors. Multi-turn not eval'd before revert. cp v0.3.1.8 back, tokenizer realigned via `git show 0175694:dialogues.py > dialogues.py` + regen + cp back (per feedback_no_git_checkout_for_temp_restore).

eval_summary.multi_turn_v2: skipped — single-turn regression triggers REVERT regardless

lessons: +20 weighted (5.0) multi-turn dialogues crowded out single-turn anchors. Same pattern as HYP49/54 — dilution beats data add when capacity-bound.
Per-category Soul drop -3pp suggests deep multi-turn additions cannibalize own category Soul scoring (G.Soul 14→11).
Phase 10 at 800K params + ~145KB corpus has VERY little marginal capacity. Each retrain that adds weighted dialogues loses ~5pp strict somewhere.
Phase 11 path is confirmed: data work alone won't push past HYP57 frontier. Need params 1.2-1.5M to absorb HYP58's content, which requires 8+hr compute infeasible at current setup.

best_baseline_label_active: v0.3.1.8-paraphrase-v3 (RESTORED after HYP59 REVERT, 803K params, vocab 4212, 2017 chunks, strict 37 / strong 49 / multi 18.7%, bpb 0.0429)

last_result_hyp58.hypothesis: HYP58 — +20 deep multi-turn dialogues for 4 weakest categories (B.Whisper/I.Toccata/C.nami-lm/G.Soul each got 5 × 3-turn dialogues).
last_result_hyp58.verdict: KEEP-DATA — dialogues 268→288, turns 400→460 (+60), corpus 2017→2069 chunks (+3%), bytes 144→146KB, vocab 4212→4222.

last_result_hyp57.hypothesis: HYP57 — retrain on HYP56 paraphrase v3 corpus (2017 chunks). d_model 96 + 240min + OMP_NUM_THREADS=4 + renice +10.
last_result_hyp57.verdict: KEEP-STRONG — all 3 axes lifted vs HYP54. Strict 33→37 (+4pp), strong 47→49 (+2pp), bpb 0.05ish→0.0429. Persona strict 2→3, Extended 6→8, Soul 12→14 (best ever). Topic 13→12 (-1 within noise). NEW negation/out-of-domain variants LAND (Nami是Aqua嗎→不是 / 今天天氣→拒答 / Aqua屬於誰→canonical). Some HYP56 deep variants still don't land (多久醒一次/會忘嗎). 4-thread cap was FASTER not slower (281 epochs in 240min vs HYP54's 30 — less thread contention overhead).

eval_summary.live_smoke: HYP56 new variants 3/6 land: negation/out-of-domain/ownership work; time-awareness/memory-flow don't yet.
eval_summary.multi_turn_v2: 28/150 (18.7%) — between HYP52 (20.7%) and HYP49 (16.7%), -2.6pp vs HYP44B frontier 21.3%. Per-cat: A.Kaspa 20%, B.Whisper 6.7%, C.nami-lm 13.3%, D.Identity 26.7% (BEST), E.Relationship 33.3%, F.Workflow 20%, G.Soul 13.3%, H.Aqua 26.7%, I.Toccata 6.7%, J.Routine 20%.

lessons: OMP_NUM_THREADS=4 is FASTER on 16-core box than no-cap. Less thread contention overhead. 281 epochs in 240min vs HYP54's 30 epochs in 240min = 9x more iterations.

More epochs at cosine-decayed lr 0.00002 doesn't overfit on in-distribution probes (bpb flat 0.043 from ep 40 → ep 281). Phase 9 §7.3 warning needs revision: at this corpus + paraphrase mix, extended training is safe.
Negation + out-of-domain paraphrases ARE learnable at 800K params with enough training. Earlier failures may have been undertrained.
Multi-hop ownership Qs (Aqua屬於誰→婕) work directly. Time-awareness Qs (多久醒一次) need more variants or different anchor structure.

best_baseline_label_active: v0.3.1.8-paraphrase-v3-thread-cap (803K params, vocab 4212, 2017 chunks, 281 epochs, strict 37 / strong 49 / bpb 0.0429)

last_result_hyp56.hypothesis: HYP56 — paraphrase v3 (+63 variants across 6 concept groups: negation/multi-hop/Toccata/out-of-domain/time-memory/Soul).
last_result_hyp56.verdict: KEEP-DATA — corpus 1957→2017 chunks (+3%), bytes 141→144KB, vocab 4193→4212. Pure data; HYP57 retrains on this.

last_result_hyp55.hypothesis: HYP55 — scale up: d_model 96→128, d_ff 256→384, heads 6→8. params 802K→1.30M (+62%). TIME_BUDGET 300min.
last_result_hyp55.verdict: REVERT — DISASTER. d_model 128 at 1.3M params undertrained at ~14 epochs (vs HYP54's 30 ep). Final bpb 0.5005 (10× worse than HYP54's ~0.05). Eval strict 22/51 (-11 vs HYP54 33), strong 40/51 (-7 vs HYP54 47). HYP35 lesson re-confirmed: bigger model NEEDS proportionally more budget. 300min wasn't enough at +62% params + reniced training. Would need 600+ min OR retain d_model 96. Restored HYP54 baseline (v0.3.1.7-paraphrase-v2).
lessons: HYP35 lesson AGAIN: bigger model at fixed budget = undertrained = REVERT. d_model 96→128 at 300min only hit ep 14. Need 600min+ to converge OR fewer params.
+62% params at +25% budget gave half the effective epochs. Should have been +62% budget MINIMUM (490min) to keep epoch count constant.
Reniced training (priority +10) hurt 5-10% on top of the d_model overhead. Compounding factor.
Phase 10 hard ceiling: at 16-core CPU + numpy-grad backend, can't scale d_model 128 in a single 5-hour run. Phase 11 path is corpus expansion + accepting longer trains (8+hr).
Cost: 5 hours train + 5 hours wall time + low-priority slowdown = high. Information gained: confirmed scale-up bottleneck. Worth it for the negative result on the optimistic path.

best_baseline_label_active: v0.3.1.7-paraphrase-v2 (RESTORED after HYP55 REVERT — 802K params, vocab 4193, corpus 1957 chunks, 13 working natural-Q variants)

last_result_hyp54.hypothesis: HYP54 — retrain on HYP53 paraphrase v2 corpus (1957 chunks, +81 from HYP53). Same arch + 240min budget.
last_result_hyp54.verdict: KEEP-INCREMENTAL — paraphrase coverage expanded from HYP52's 8 working to 13 working (8 old + 5 new HYP53 variants). Strict 33 (-1), strong 47 (-1) vs HYP52, both within 5pp cap. Live test confirms: all HYP52-era variants still work (妳叫什麼/什麼是Kaspa/Whisper是什麼啊/什麼是Toccata/Nami是誰啊 all canonical), some new HYP53 variants land (TCR怎麼跑 / Nami怎麼除錯 / AutoMLIR是什麼啊 / Nami怎麼來的), some don't (Nami名字意思 / Nami是chatbot嗎 / phase 11是什麼 / linkers是什麼). Net +5 working variants for -1 strict cost. UX win continues.

eval_summary.live_paraphrase_test: HYP52 old variants 5/5 PASS (all hold), HYP53 new variants 4/8 PASS (TCR怎麼跑/Nami怎麼除錯/AutoMLIR是什麼啊/Nami怎麼來的). Total working: 13.

lessons: 75 new paraphrases at same training budget = dilution. ~50% of new variants land vs HYP52's 100% on its 59 variants. The model can absorb finite variants per epoch budget; doubling variants halves landing rate.
Old paraphrases (HYP52 ones) are STABLE across retrains. They keep working when more variants are added. So paraphrase additions are non-destructive — just budget-limited.
Strict -1 / strong -1 is the cost of training capacity going to new variants instead of canonical reinforcement. Net UX wins (+5 working variants) outweigh metric loss.
Phase 11 scale-up signal clear: at 800K params + ~140KB corpus, model is variant-capacity-bound. Need 1.2-1.5M params + 300+ min budget for next round of paraphrase additions to fully land.

best_baseline_label_active: v0.3.1.7-paraphrase-v2 (802K params, vocab 4193, corpus 1957 chunks, +13 natural-Q variants live)

last_result_hyp53.hypothesis: HYP53 — extend paraphrase variants 59→134 across 16 concept groups (TCR/Soul/AutoMLIR/Linux terms/Nami origin/chatbot/Phase/Whisper/Toccata/Aqua/ClawX/Kaspa/numpy-grad/autochat/個性/夢想).
last_result_hyp53.verdict: KEEP-DATA — dialogues 130→205, turns 262→337, corpus 1876→1957 chunks (+4%), bytes 137→141KB, vocab 4174→4193 (+19). Pure data work, no train. HYP54 launches retrain on this corpus.

last_result_hyp52.hypothesis: HYP52 — retrain on HYP51 paraphrase-expanded corpus (1876 chunks). +59 1-turn paraphrase dialogues for natural-Q coverage.
last_result_hyp52.verdict: KEEP — qualitative win: paraphrase variants land canonical answers live. '妳叫什麼'/'你的名字是'/'怎麼稱呼妳' → Nami ✓. '什麼是Kaspa'/'什麼是Toccata'/'Whisper是什麼啊' → all canonical ✓. '誰是Ryan' → 'Nami的人類夥伴工程師' ✓. Strict 34 (-3) within 5pp cap; strong 48 (+1 vs HYP49); persona prefix 5/5; bpb 0.0509 (vs HYP49 0.0493). New active baseline = v0.3.1.6-paraphrase. The strict number drop is the cost of paraphrase weight crowding out canonical reinforcement; UX gain dominates.

eval_summary.live_paraphrase_test: 8/8 natural-Q variants land canonical answers: 妳叫什麼→Nami, 你的名字是→Nami, 怎麼稱呼妳→Nami, Nami是誰啊→厲害的AI工程師夥伴, 什麼是Kaspa→基於BlockDAG, Whisper是什麼啊→Kaspa上的隱私covenant, 什麼是Toccata→Kaspa主網hardfork升級版本, 誰是Ryan→Nami的人類夥伴工程師.
eval_summary.multi_turn_v2: 31/150 (20.7%) — second-best phase 10 (HYP44B 21.3% is top). Per-cat: A.Kaspa 20% (+6.7 vs HYP49), B.Whisper 6.7%, C.nami-lm 13.3% (+6.7), D.Identity 20% (+6.7), E.Relationship 40% (+6.7), F.Workflow 26.7% (+6.7), G.Soul 13.3%, H.Aqua 26.7% (+6.7), I.Toccata 20% (+6.7), J.Routine 20%.

lessons: Paraphrase 1-turn dialogues at weight 5.0 successfully train variant→canonical mapping. The natural-Q coverage Ryan asked for (5/15 msg 3730) is functional. UX > metric.

Strict eval crowd-out cost: -3pp. Paraphrase capacity consumed some canonical-reinforcement capacity. At 800K params + 137KB corpus this is expected. Phase 11 scale-up (2x params + 5x corpus) should absorb both.
Strong 48 vs HYP49 47 = +1pp despite strict drop. Means 'tail-bleed cleaner' even though prefix-match still finds the right anchor. Web_chat trim guard helps surface the gain.
Multi-turn eval running in background — will record in next state update.

best_baseline_label_active: v0.3.1.6-paraphrase (800K params, vocab 4174, corpus 1876 chunks, +natural-Q coverage)

last_result_hyp50.hypothesis: HYP50 — HYP49 baseline + TIME_BUDGET 180→240 min. Buy back epochs HYP49 lost to corpus growth.
last_result_hyp50.verdict: REVERT — eval strict 34/51 (-3 vs HYP49 37) on pinned tokenizer eval. Strong 46/51 (-1 vs HYP49 47). bpb 0.0471 vs HYP49 0.0493 marginal. More epochs at 240min didn't compensate — cosine target 40 ep meant lr stayed higher, model didn't deepen the late-epoch fine-tuning. Per-cat: Topic strict 11/16 (HYP49 13 = -2), persona 2/5 (HYP49 3 = -1). Multi-turn skipped (eval-multiturn rebuilds tokenizer + vocab mismatch). HYP50 worse on all measured axes vs HYP49.

eval_summary.multi_turn_v2: skipped — tokenizer drift to 4174 from HYP51 paraphrase commit, eval would mismatch.

lessons: Buying epochs via cosine target widening doesn't compound — HYP46 already showed this. The cosine bug fix was a one-time gain, more epochs after that hits diminishing returns at this scale.
30 epochs at corpus=1793 (HYP50) ≠ 30 epochs at corpus=1487 (HYP44B). The chunk count matters. HYP50 actually saw MORE batches than HYP44B but each canonical Q got fewer reinforcements.
Vocab drift kept biting: HYP49 4132, HYP51 added paraphrases → 4174 mid-experiment. Need to lock corpus + vocab snapshot per HYP commit (workflow improvement).

last_result_hyp49.hypothesis: HYP49 — retrain on HYP47+HYP48 expanded corpus (1793 chunks vs 1487, +21%). Same arch (num_layers=4, lr=0.002) + cosine fix + TIME_BUDGET=180min.
last_result_hyp49.verdict: MIXED — per §2 multi_axis = REVERT. bpb 0.0323→0.0493 (+52% breaks 5% cap), strong 50→47 (-3, within 5pp), multi-turn 21.3→16.7% (-4.6pp), strict 37=37 (same). BUT vocab drifted 3779→4132 over the day's data work + daily file additions → can't cleanly revert to v0.3.1.4-cosine weights (vocab mismatch with current corpus). Pragmatic state: serve HYP49 weights as v0.3.1.5-corpus-expanded, document multi-turn regression, plan HYP50 retrain with better strategy.

eval_summary.multi_turn_v2: 25/150 (16.7%) — vs HYP44B 21.3%, -4.6pp REGRESSED. Per-cat: B.Whisper COLLAPSED 13.3→0% (despite HYP48 adding 4 Whisper dialogues), F.Workflow -13.3pp, A.Kaspa -6.7pp. Wins: I.Toccata 0→13.3% (HYP48 worked here), D.Identity +13.3pp, J.Routine +13.3pp.

lessons: Corpus 100KB → 132KB (+27%) wasn't enough to compensate for the +21% chunk dilution. Each canonical Q now sees fewer training steps. The result is uniform decay across most categories — no breakthrough, scattered wins offset by scattered losses.

HYP48 dialogue additions DID work for I.Toccata (+13.3pp) but FAILED for B.Whisper (-13.3pp). The difference: Toccata content was sparse before, so 4 new dialogues moved the needle. Whisper was already represented in PERSONA_QA + TOPIC_QA + dialogues, so 4 more diluted rather than reinforced.

Vocab drift mid-experiment hurts: synthesize_qa.py changes + new daily files = vocab 3779 → 4132 means old weights can't load against current corpus. Mitigation: snapshot tokenizer_vocab.json alongside every KEEP commit so revert is exact.
Phase 11 needs 5x corpus growth (104KB → 500KB+) AND proportional params scale-up (762K → 1.5M+) to overcome the dilution-vs-anchor balance. Halfway moves (+21%) just rearrange the failure modes.

Strict 37 holding while strong dropped -3 suggests degen patterns increased slightly — tail generation got noisier even though prefix correctness held. Consistent with 'undertrained on expanded corpus' diagnosis.

best_baseline_label_active: v0.3.1.5-corpus-expanded (HYP49 weights, multi-turn 16.7% < HYP44B 21.3% but vocab-aligned with current corpus)
phase10_frontier_per_metric: v0.3.1.4-cosine (strict 37, strong 50, multi 21.3%, bpb 0.0323) — REVERT target if vocab realignment were free

last_result_hyp48.hypothesis: HYP48 — dialogues.py +12 multi-turn on weak categories (Whisper 4, Toccata 4, nami-lm 3, KRC-20 1). Data work, no training.
last_result_hyp48.verdict: KEEP-DATA — dialogues 59→71, turns 166→201, corpus 1758→1793 chunks (+35), bytes 127→132KB, vocab 4115→4132 (Toccata/Whisper/SilverScript proper nouns). Pairs with HYP47 = corpus 1487→1793 (+21%) ready for HYP49 retrain.

last_result_hyp47.hypothesis: HYP47 — synthesize_qa.py: H3 + interview Q&A parsers. Data work, no training.
last_result_hyp47.verdict: KEEP-DATA — corpus 1487→1758 chunks (+18%), bytes 104→127KB (+22%), vocab 3779→4115 (+336). Books contribute the bulk: 464 H3 headings + 103 interview Q&A blocks now caught.

last_result_hyp46.hypothesis: HYP46 — epochs 30→50 + budget 180→270 min on HYP44B (v0.3.1.4-cosine) baseline. cosine target 45 ep. Explores phase 10 saturation: does extra 20 epochs lift strict 37→40+ or just deeper overfit?
last_result_hyp46.verdict: REVERT — multi-turn regressed 21.3% → 17.3% (-4pp), dialogue_passed 2/50 → 0/50, strong 50 → 48 (-2). Strict +2 (37→39) and bpb -4% (0.0323→0.0309) are real but insufficient to overcome multi-turn loss. Lesson: more epochs at this scale = overfit single-turn canonical templates at cost of dialogue coherence. v0.3.1.4-cosine remains the right baseline. cp .bak → model_weights.json executed.

eval_summary.multi_turn_v2: 26/150 turn pct 17.3% — vs HYP44B 21.3%, REGRESSED -4pp. dialogue_passed 0/50 (vs HYP44B 2/50, -2). Per-category: A.Kaspa 13.3% (-6.7), B.Whisper 6.7% (-6.7), C.nami-lm 13.3% (+6.7), D.Identity 13.3% (-6.7), E.Relationship 33.3% (-6.7), F.Workflow 26.7% (=), G.Soul 13.3% (-20), H.Aqua 26.7% (+6.7), I.Toccata 6.7% (-6.7), J.Routine 20% (=).

lessons: Phase 10 saturation point identified: 30 epochs / TIME_BUDGET 180min / num_layers 4 is the sweet spot. Going past it (45-50 ep with cosine targeting 45) overfits single-turn templates at multi-turn cost.

Strict +2 + bpb -4% are LOCAL minima signals (training distribution improved) while multi-turn -4pp is the GENERALIZATION signal (held-out coherence dropped). Always trust generalization over training metrics.
G.Soul collapsed from 33.3% → 13.3% (-20pp): the categories with deeper context tracking suffer first under overfit. C.nami-lm gained +6.7pp because that category is more rote (lookup-style).
Practical phase 10 budget recommendation: stick with 180min/30 ep until corpus expands (phase 11). More epochs is not the lever to push at 100KB corpus.
REVERT cost: 4.5 hours wall + ~$0 (CPU). Information gained: saturation point + overfit signature. Worth it.

last_result_hyp44b.hypothesis: HYP44B — cosine LR schedule fix. `time_budget/7.0` → `max(20, time_budget/360)`. Phase 10 隱形 bug 修正：cosine schedule 假設 1542 ep / 實際 ~30 ep，從未退火。1-line fix on top of HYP43 baseline.
last_result_hyp44b.verdict: KEEP — MAJOR WIN. All axes improved, all surprising. bpb 0.225→0.0323 (-86% well into overfit zone but eval IMPROVED). Strict 29→37/51 (+8pp = 72.5%). Strong 45→50/51 (+5pp = 98.0%). Multi-turn 14.7→21.3% (+6.6pp = BEST EVER). First 2 dialogues fully pass (was 0). Phase 10 cosine bug was eating most of convergence potential. New baseline = v0.3.1.4-cosine.

eval_summary.single_turn_strict: 37/51 (72.5%) — Persona 2/5 (degen artifacts in tail), Extended 6/10, Topic 14/16, Soul 15/20.
eval_summary.multi_turn_v2: 32/150 turn pct 21.3% — BEST EVER. dialogue_passed 2/50 — first time non-zero. Per-category: A.Kaspa 20%, B.Whisper 13.3%, C.nami-lm 6.7%, D.Identity 20%, E.Relationship 40%, F.Workflow 26.7%, G.Soul 33.3%, H.Aqua 20%, I.Toccata 13.3%, J.Routine 20%.

lessons: Phase 10's 'eval saturation at 38/51' was actually 'lr never decayed'. Fixing the cosine schedule freed an entire dimension of convergence. HYP38-42 may all retro-succeed if re-run with this fix.

bpb < 0.1 ≠ overfit when eval is in-distribution and probes are well-aligned. §7.3 warning was overcautious: at this corpus size + frozen probes, lower bpb correlates with better eval. The danger is on OOD probes which we don't have yet.
Karpathy/autotrain v3 'Assumptions:' field would have caught this 5 HYPs ago: every phase 10 HYP assumed cosine schedule worked. It didn't. The 5-line ritual upgrade pays for itself.

1-line lever can outperform architecture changes. HYP43 (depth, +13% params) gave +7pp single. HYP44B (cosine fix, 0 param change) gave another +5pp single + +6.6pp multi-turn. 'Free' improvements beat expensive ones at this stage.
Multi-turn 21.3% is breakthrough territory. Previous ceiling was 20.7% (HYP36). With more budget + corpus growth in phase 11, 30%+ should be reachable.

last_result_hyp44a.hypothesis: HYP44A — eval.py strict mode infra. Adds 'strict' tier = strong + no degeneration (char triple / mid-sentence ? / bigram repeat).
last_result_hyp44a.verdict: KEEP-INFRA — no training. On HYP43 weights: strict 29/51 (56.9%) vs strong 45/51 (88.2%). Captures Ryan's 5/13 08:40 web_chat 🤔 feedback signal as automated detector.
lessons: Eval prefix-match was lying ~half the time. New strict mode catches the 'token 1-3 correct, tail collapses' pattern Ryan visually identified.
Gate updated: persona_strict == 5 AND topic strict+partial ≥ 10 (was strong-based).

last_result_hyp43.hypothesis: HYP43 — num_layers 3→4 (+13% params 676K→762K) + TIME_BUDGET 90→180min. Pure structural depth lever after HYP38-42 micro-tweak saturation at v0.3.1.2 baseline.
last_result_hyp43.verdict: KEEP — STRONG WIN, first real architecture KEEP in phase 10. All 3 hard axes improved: single-turn 38→45/51 (+7pp = 88.2%), bpb 0.35→0.2249 (-36%), persona 3+1p→5/5 strong. Multi-turn 13.3→14.7% (+1.4pp). 30 epochs in 183min wall. New baseline = v0.3.1.3-deep4.

eval_summary.single_turn: 45/51 (88.2%) strong — Persona 5/5, Extended 10/10, Topic 13/16, Soul 17/20. ALL categories improved vs baseline.
eval_summary.multi_turn_v2: 22/150 (14.7%) — A.Kaspa 13.3%, B.Whisper 6.7% (+6.7pp), C.nami-lm 6.7%, D.Identity 6.7%, E.Relationship 33.3%, F.Workflow 33.3%, G.Soul 20% (+13.3pp), H.Aqua 20% (-6.7pp), I.Toccata 0%, J.Routine 6.7%.

lessons: Depth lever (num_layers 3→4) IS the right lever at this scale. Adds 1 attention+FFN iteration per token — exactly what multi-turn coherence needs. +13% params cost is cheap vs HYP35's d_model bump which was +41%.

Budget proportionality matters: HYP35 d_model 96→128 at 90min budget gave 10 ep (undertrained, 31/51). HYP43 num_layers 3→4 at 180min gave 30 ep (well-trained, 45/51). Pattern: scale-up needs proportional budget. Per-epoch ~6min for 4-layer vs ~5min for 3-layer = +20% wall time per epoch, exactly the overhead we paid.
v0.3.1.3-deep4 recovers most of v0.3.1.1's 47/51 ceiling (88% vs 92%) despite 21 fewer epochs trained — the depth lever did more for capability than 21 extra epochs would have at 3 layers.
Cosine schedule bug from §8.5 didn't block KEEP. The schedule's flat lr=0.002 throughout was enough to drive convergence. But fixing it (HYP45) could yield more late-epoch bpb drop.

Multi-turn only +1.4pp vs single-turn +7pp suggests depth helps single-turn pattern completion more than multi-turn context tracking. Multi-turn breakthrough needs corpus scale (phase 11) more than depth.

last_result_hyp42.hypothesis: HYP42 — HYP40 particle augmentation (corpus +啊/+嗎 variants weight 0.2) + TIME_BUDGET 90→180min. Buy back epochs HYP40 lost.
last_result_hyp42.verdict: REVERT — same single-turn as baseline (38/51 = 74.5%), no axis improved. Multi-turn 12.0% (slightly below baseline 13.3%). Particle robustness mechanism CONFIRMED again on raw tests (Nami是誰啊？→'厲害的的？' weak, but Kaspa是什麼嗎？→'基於BlockDAG的區塊鏈' ✓), but at this corpus size the augmentation crowd-out matches whatever capacity training time recovers. Per §2 multi_axis: zero axes improved → REVERT.

eval_summary.single_turn: 38/51 (74.5%) — SAME as v0.3.1.2-realigned baseline. Persona 3+1p/5, Extended 8+1p/10, Topic 11/16, Soul 14/20.
eval_summary.multi_turn_v2: 18/150 (12.0%) — below baseline 13.3%. B.Whisper 0%, I.Toccata 0%, G.Soul 6.7%, H.Aqua 26.7%, E.Relationship 33.3%.
eval_summary.raw_particle_test: Nami是誰啊？ → weak; Kaspa是什麼嗎？ → ✓ canonical; persona probe 5/5

lessons: Doubling budget (90→180min) didn't recover what HYP40 lost: even with 2x time, augmentation crowd-out balances training gain — net result identical to baseline.

Mechanism re-confirmation: augmentation trains particle robustness on the variants it sees, but the inference-time normalizer in web_chat.py already strips the same particles (啊喔哦呀呢嗯…) — duplicate work. Until corpus or model scales up, the frontend strip is the cheaper path.

Pattern across HYP38-42 (5 REVERTs in a row): single-axis levers (RMSNorm, corpus aug, budget extension) all stuck at the v0.3.1.2-realigned baseline floor. Need EITHER a non-trivial scale bump (params 670K→1.3M+, corpus 100KB→500KB) OR a structural lever (multi-task heads, curriculum, hard-negative aug) — micro-tweaks have saturated.
HYP43 candidate: num_layers 3→4 (params 670K→~880K, ~30% capacity bump). Lighter than d_model 96→128 (which severely undertrained at HYP35) — layers add depth without proportional FFN inflation.

last_result_hyp41.hypothesis: HYP41 — realign baseline retrain (fix vocab drift). Same config as v0.3.1.1, fresh corpus regen.
last_result_hyp41.verdict: KEEP as new working baseline v0.3.1.2-realigned. 21 epochs, bpb 0.349. Single-turn 38/51 = 74.5% (lower than v0.3.1.1's 47/51 — corpus grew with new daily files / topic notes, signal more diluted). Multi-turn TBD. But vocab=3779 aligned with current corpus → web_chat works again. PRACTICAL BASELINE for ongoing HYPs.

eval_summary.note: Lower than v0.3.1.1's 47/51 because corpus is now bigger (more daily/topic content), same training budget less per-Q exposure

lessons: Vocab drift is real: corpus regen between HYPs grows vocab (3738→3779 in ~10 days). Old baseline weights become incompatible.
Realign retrain is now part of the workflow: every ~10 HYPs, refresh baseline against current corpus to keep weights+vocab aligned.
Single-turn dropped 47→38 partly from undertraining (21 vs ideal 30 ep) and partly from corpus dilution. Future HYPs should account for this floor — improvements are relative to 38/51 now, not 47/51.

last_result_hyp40.hypothesis: HYP40 — corpus augmentation. Each canonical Q gets +啊?/+嗎? variants weight 0.2.
last_result_hyp40.verdict: REVERT — augmentation MECHANISM works (raw 'Nami是誰啊？' → '厲害的AI工程師夥伴' canonical), but undertrained at 9 epochs (corpus 2.8x slowed each epoch to ~680s). Single-turn 37/51 = 72.5%, multi-turn 12.0%. Particle robustness validated but cost too high without longer budget.

eval_summary.raw_particle_test: Nami是誰啊？→'厲害的AI工程師夥伴' ✅, Nami是誰嗎？→'厲害的AI工程師夥伴' ✅, Kaspa是什麼啊？→'基於BlockDAG的區塊鏈' ✅, Ryan是誰啊？→contaminated, Nami是誰呢？→noise (呢 not in trained variants)

lessons: Augmentation generates ROBUST behavior on trained variants — particle 啊/嗎 successfully handled. The OOD UX fix Ryan asked for works at the training level.
But corpus 2.8x → epoch time 2.8x → 90min budget gives only 9 epochs vs needed ~25. Severely undertrained. Net effect: gain robustness, lose canonical accuracy.
Next HYP design: HYP42+ = same augmentation + TIME_BUDGET 270min (3x baseline). Should give ~22 epochs at this corpus size. Then primary metrics shouldn't regress.

Side effect of every REVERT: vocab keeps drifting because the corpus regen pulls in fresh daily files / topic notes between HYPs. Baseline weights from earlier HYPs become incompatible with current vocab. HYP41 realign retrain establishes a new aligned baseline for current corpus state.

last_result_hyp39.hypothesis: HYP39 — RMSNorm retry (HYP38 crash fixed). Pure architecture lever, baseline corpus.
last_result_hyp39.verdict: REVERT — RMSNorm REGRESSED. Single-turn 36/51 (70.6%) vs baseline 47/51 (92.2%). Multi-turn 13.3% (= baseline, no gain). 21 epochs in 90 min. Llama2 'free upgrade' does NOT transfer to 670K params + 100KB corpus.

eval_summary.single_turn: 36/51 (70.6%) — Persona 4/5 (lost Kaspa!), Extended 7/10, Topic 11+1p/16, Soul 13/20. WORSE than baseline 47/51 on every category.
eval_summary.multi_turn_v2: 20/150 turn pct 13.3% — same as baseline (no gain, no loss). B.Whisper 6.7% (-0pp), I.Toccata 0% (= baseline, no improvement).

lessons: RMSNorm Llama2 result DOES NOT transfer to small scale. At 670K params + 100KB corpus, LayerNorm's β (bias) + mean-centering BOTH appear to help. The 'free 25% speed + matched quality' claim is conditional on scale.
Possible mechanism: at small d_model (96), variance estimate is noisy → mean-centering stabilizes. At Llama 70B's d_model (8192), Law of Large Numbers makes mean estimate stable enough to skip.

Possible mechanism 2: β absorbs residual stream drift. Small models accumulate more drift per layer (fewer attention heads to average over). Removing β forces gradient through γ alone which is less expressive.

Architectural Llama2-canonical levers need RE-VALIDATION at our scale, not just blind transfer. Next try: RMSNorm at d_model 256 / corpus 500KB, OR keep LayerNorm bias=False (HYP21 baseline) — the best small-scale configuration.
Cost: 90min training + ~10 min eval = HYP38 (crashed) + HYP39 (failed) = 3+ hours total compute for RMSNorm experiment. Net learning: confirmed LayerNorm bias=False is local optimum for our scale.

last_result_hyp38.hypothesis: HYP38 — RMSNorm replaces LayerNorm (Llama 1/2/3 canonical). First architecture lever.
last_result_hyp38.verdict: REVERT BY CRASH — training completed 29 epochs successfully (persona 5/5 pass), but save() crashed with AttributeError 'RMSNorm has no attribute beta'. The save fix (getattr) was added DURING the run via edit-to-train.py, but the running process had already imported the buggy save(). Result: no weights persisted, no eval, no experiments.jsonl entry. Treat as REVERT — model state unchanged (still v0.3.1.1-realigned baseline).
lessons: When changing architecture (LayerNorm → RMSNorm), the save/load code path must be checked FIRST, before launching training. I added the load() fix when web_chat hit the AttributeError, but missed that save() had the same pattern. ~90 min of training compute wasted.

Pattern for next architecture lever: 1) edit Module class (RMSNorm/RoPE/etc), 2) audit save/load in train.py for any direct attribute access on the swapped components, 3) smoke-test save() with a 1-epoch run, 4) only THEN launch full HYP.
save() fix has now been applied (getattr around .beta access). HYP39 retry of RMSNorm will save cleanly.

Training itself ran fine: persona 5/5 at the end means RMSNorm gradients propagated correctly through 29 epochs. The hypothesis (uniform lift / no measurable change) is still untested — we have no eval data.

last_result_hyp37.hypothesis: HYP37 — HYP36 base (weight 2.0 + persona-Whisper + direct-Toccata + 180min) + 4 reinforcement dialogues (2 nami-lm + 2 Soul) to protect C/G categories.
last_result_hyp37.verdict: REVERT — Soul anchor WORKED (G.Soul 6.7% → 20% +13.3pp!) but trade-off shifted to E.Relationship (33.3% → 20% below floor 28%) + J.Routine (26.7% → 6.7% collapsed). C.nami-lm partially recovered (0% → 6.7% but still < 9.3% floor). Net: 2 floor breaks (C, E) vs HYP36's 2 (C, G) — different categories failed.

eval_summary.single_turn: 42/51 (82.4%) — same headline, Soul 17/20 (HYP36 was 15), Extended 8/10 (HYP36 was 10).

lessons: Soul anchor MECHANISM CONFIRMED — G.Soul jumped 6.7% → 20% with 2 anchor dialogues. The 'embed-not-add reinforcement' pattern works for individual categories.
But same crowd-out budget — 4 anchor dialogues lifted G and partially C, at cost of E (Relationship -20pp) and J (Routine -20pp). The hammer just hit different nails.
Across HYP31-37, the persistent observation: at 673K params + ~22-44 epochs, model has fixed embedding capacity for ~75-80% of category coverage. Each HYP redistributes which 20-25% breaks.

Next direction options: (a) Llama-canonical lever like RMSNorm (HYP-Llama-A) — uniform capability lift not category-redistribution, (b) write 10+ anchor dialogues to cover ALL categories, push everything up, (c) accept this as ceiling and ship HYP37 weights as 'enriched but tradeoff' v0.4.0-experimental for voice-nami-lm to use.
I.Toccata 46.7% is the most stable win across HYPs — direct phrasing + corpus density got it locked in. This signal is real, even though strict KEEP gate keeps failing on other categories.

last_result_hyp36.hypothesis: HYP36 — HYP34 design + TIME_BUDGET 180 min. Same dialogues + weight 2.0 + d_model 96, doubled budget.
last_result_hyp36.verdict: REVERT but CLOSEST TO KEEP across HYP31-36. 44 epochs reached (vs HYP34's 22 — double as designed). Both primary targets HIT (Whisper 26.7%, Toccata 46.7%). Multi-turn overall 20.7% — BEST OF ALL HYPs. Single-turn 42/51 = same as HYP34. Floor breaks: C.nami-lm 0% AND G.Soul 6.7% (HYP34 had 3 floor breaks, HYP36 has 2 — progress).

eval_summary.single_turn: 42/51 (82.4%) — same as HYP34, distribution slightly better (Extended 10/10 vs 9/10+1p, Topic 12+1p vs 11+1p, Soul 15 vs 14+1p)

lessons: Doubled budget DELIVERED — 44 epochs vs HYP34's 22, bpb 0.181 vs 0.325, overall multi-turn 20.7% vs 16.0%. Time helps.
Toccata went from 27% (HYP34) → 46.7% (HYP36). Direct phrasing + doubled training = best Toccata signal across all HYPs. The 'easier signal' interpretation from HYP33/34 confirmed.

But C.nami-lm collapsed to 0% (worse than HYP34's 6.7%) and G.Soul still 6.7% — these two categories appear MOST sensitive to embedding crowd-out from new content, regardless of weight or training time.

Path forward: need to PROTECT C.nami-lm and G.Soul specifically. Options: (a) write 1-2 dialogue-pairs anchoring nami-lm + Soul that reinforce existing context, (b) drop dialogue weight to 1.5, (c) shrink new dialogue count 10→6 (drop 2 Whisper + 2 Toccata), (d) Llama-canonical lever (RMSNorm) for general capability lift.
Multi-turn 20.7% is a real milestone — first time > 20% across all HYPs. Even though strict criteria says REVERT, this is the cleanest forward path proof we have.

last_result_hyp35.hypothesis: HYP35 — d_model 96→128 (+41% params 673K→947K) + HYP34 design. Capacity bottleneck hypothesis: bigger model should absorb +30 weighted chunks without crowd-out.
last_result_hyp35.verdict: REVERT — bigger model SEVERELY UNDERTRAINED. 90min budget gave only 10 epochs (vs HYP34's 22). bpb 0.890 (vs HYP34's 0.325) is 2.7x worse — model never converged. Single-turn 31/51 = 60.8% WORST of all HYPs.
lessons: Bigger model needs proportionally MORE training time. d_model 96→128 (+41% params) at SAME 90min budget gave fewer epochs (10 vs 22), and the extra capacity didn't help because optimizer never converged.

Pure capacity bump is WRONG at this scale — model is too undertrained to USE the extra parameters. Persona 5/5 (vs HYP34 4/5) is the early-loop signal that warmups well, but deep training (topic/soul) collapsed.
Correct next HYP: keep d_model 96 + TIME_BUDGET 90→180min. Gives smaller model more epochs to push the HYP34 design closer to floor compliance. Capacity bump should wait until budget can pay for it.
Across HYP31-35, the design winner is unambiguously HYP34: weight 2.0 + persona-Whisper + direct-Toccata + d_model 96. Stick with HYP34 structure, just extend training budget.

last_result_hyp34.hypothesis: HYP34 path D — weight 5.0→2.0 + persona-anchored Whisper + DIRECT-phrasing Toccata. Test whether lower weight gives other categories room while keeping primary targets.
last_result_hyp34.verdict: REVERT but BEST BALANCE so far. BOTH primary targets hit (Whisper 26.7%, Toccata 26.7% — Toccata first time clean!). Single-turn 42/51 = 82.4% (best of 4 HYPs). But A.Kaspa / C.nami-lm / G.Soul still below 70% floor.

per_category.I.Toccata: 26.7% (+26.7pp ✅✅ — first clean hit, direct phrasing worked)

lessons: PRIMARY TARGETS BOTH HIT: Whisper anchor + Toccata direct phrasing = first time ≥20% on both. Design pattern validated.
Weight 2.0 helped — Whisper holds at 27%, Toccata jumps from HYP33's 7% to 27%, Aqua holds at 20% (vs HYP33's 27%, smaller buffer but still above floor).
BUT 3 categories (A.Kaspa, C.nami-lm, G.Soul) still drop. Implies model capacity (673K params) is the actual bottleneck, not weight or anchor.
Cleanest signal so far across HYP31-34. Best single-turn (42), best per-target hit rate. Decision criteria still REVERT because floor breach, but this is the BEST DESIGN.
Next HYP candidates: (a) d_model 96→128 (+33% params, addresses capacity directly), (b) weight further 2.0→1.0 (cheap), (c) train budget 90→180min for more epochs.

last_result_hyp33.hypothesis: HYP33 — persona-anchored first turn (embed-not-add). Whisper/Toccata dialogues with first turn replaced by Nami persona question to keep new content bonded to soul layer instead of competing.
last_result_hyp33.verdict: REVERT — persona anchor DID succeed at its stated goal (G.Soul + H.Aqua + E.Relationship held within or above 70% floor) but at the cost of (a) primary target I.Toccata only +6.7pp (failed ≥20% threshold), (b) other categories A.Kaspa / C.nami-lm / J.Routine dropped below floor, (c) single-turn 39/51 = 76.5% (worst of all three HYPs).
lessons: Persona-anchoring WORKS for protecting soul/aqua/relationship from embedding competition — G/H/E all held within or above floor for the first time across HYP31/32/33. The mechanism is real.
But persona-anchoring SHIFTS the damage, doesn't remove it. With same weight=5.0 and ~21 epochs, four other categories (A/C/J + I) absorbed the loss G/H/E avoided.

Toccata anchor ('Nami興奮什麼？') was weaker than expected — only 1/15 turn hits vs HYP31's 6/15 and HYP32's 3/15. The persona phrasing made the model worse at canonical 'Toccata是什麼' eval probes, not better.

Single-turn 47→39 across three HYPs (47/41/43/39) suggests model capacity is fundamentally insufficient for +30 weighted-5 chunks. Next path should lower weight (5→2) AND/OR grow capacity (d_model 96→128) before retrying content design.
HYP33 confirms HYP31/32 confirms HYP30 — phase 10 needs eval_multiturn_v2 to grow OR model to grow. 50-dialogue eval × tiny model is structurally noise-limited.

last_result_hyp32.hypothesis: HYP32 — same 10 Whisper/Toccata multi-turn dialogues as HYP31 + TIME_BUDGET 90→180min. Test whether HYP31's regression was undertraining (24ep) vs the dialogues themselves.
last_result_hyp32.verdict: REVERT — 51 epochs reached (2.1× HYP31's 24, still less than baseline 122). Whisper/Toccata targets hit at the threshold (both 20%) but THREE other categories now below 70% floor: E.Relationship 26.7% (floor 28%), G.Soul 6.7% (floor 9.3%), H.Aqua 13.3% (floor 18.7%). Single-turn 43/51 vs baseline 47/51. The dialogues themselves cause embedding-space competition, not just undertraining — confirmed by HYP31→HYP32 paired comparison.
lessons: HYP31 vs HYP32 paired comparison decouples the data effect from undertraining: with 2.1× more epochs HYP32 still regressed E/G/H below floor, and single-turn still regressed 43/51 vs 47/51. The dialogues themselves compete with existing soul/relationship/aqua probes in embedding space.
Direction-correct (Whisper/Toccata gain confirmed twice) but execution wrong (weight-5 chunks crowd out other categories).

Next attempts (HYP33+) should: (a) lower dialogue weight 5.0→2.0~3.0, (b) shorten Q/A wording so vocab pressure is smaller, (c) write the new dialogues to REINFORCE not REPLACE existing soul/aqua context (e.g. embed Whisper Q within an existing soul-layer dialogue's turn 4-5), (d) consider growing model capacity (d_model 96→128) to absorb more context without competition.

last_result_hyp31.hypothesis: HYP31 — add 5 Whisper + 5 Toccata multi-turn dialogues to dialogues.py to address B.Whisper 0/15 and I.Toccata 0/15 in eval_multiturn_v2 baseline.
last_result_hyp31.verdict: REVERT — primary targets hit (B.Whisper +27pp, I.Toccata +40pp) but G.Soul collapsed 13.3% → 0% and C.nami-lm dropped 13.3% → 6.7%, both below the 70% baseline floor. Single-turn also regressed 47/51 → 41/51 (-6 hits). Confounded with undertraining: 24 epochs vs baseline 122 (system load 5x higher today).
lessons: Confounded experiment: added DATA + reduced TRAINING (system load). Can't tell if data alone helped or undertraining caused the topic decay.
Next HYP must control for training time — either run baseline at matching epoch count, or give HYP a longer time budget under quiet system load.
G.Soul collapse from 13.3% → 0% is the clearest signal: 24 epochs is genuinely insufficient for soul-layer retention regardless of data changes.
Whisper + Toccata weight-5 chunks DID land — those 2 categories saw real lift. Keep the dialogues for next attempt; only revert weights.
last_result_hyp31.revert_action: model_weights.json restored from .v0.3.1-baseline.bak (md5 verified). dialogues.py reverted via git checkout to drop the 10 new Whisper/Toccata dialogues. Corpus regen put vocab at 3738 (drifted slightly from baseline's 3780 due to daily files changing since AM); baseline weights cannot be re-evaluated against current corpus without training but the byte-for-byte restore is verified.

last_result.hypothesis: v0.3.1-baseline retrain — same HYP22 config on current corpus (vocab 3592→3780 from new topic notes).
last_result.verdict: BASELINE established 2026-05-09 09:54. eval.py 47/51 (92.2%) — 5/5 + 10/10 + 15/16 + 17/20. eval_multiturn_v2 baseline: 0/50 dialogues (0.0%), 20/150 turns (13.3%). Phase 10 entry condition met.
last_result.note: v0.3.1 baseline numbers locked. Phase 10 v1.0 gate: dialogue >= 30/50 OR turn >= 60%. Distance: +30 dialogue or +47 turn percentage points. Strongest cat: E.Relationship 40%; weakest: B.Whisper / I.Toccata 0% (probably under-represented in corpus).

last_result_v17_archived.hypothesis: HYP17 (Phase 7 step 2): SOUL_QA 53→83 (+30 Ryan-Nami story / shared vocab / project memories / daily vibe) + DIALOGUES 19→29 (+10 multi-turn rhythm conversations). Goal: extend Soul layer beyond inner-narrative into shared history + conversational depth.
last_result_v17_archived.verdict: KEEP — Topic +1, Soul +8 hits (with extended probes), bpb noise within 5%
last_result_v17_archived.reason: Reached ep 80 in 3624s (matches HYP16 trajectory). bpb 0.0936 vs HYP16 0.0885 = +5.8% (within noise floor). Eval with EXTENDED probe set (20 soul instead of 10 — added 10 new probes for HYP17-trained content): Persona 5/5, Extended 10/10, Topic 15/16 (HYP16 was 14/16, +1 — autochat now hits, BlockDAG still miss), Soul 15/20 (was 7/10 with old set — now 5/10 old + 10/10 new). Overall 45/51 = 88.2% (HYP16 was 36/41 = 87.8%). Marginal numerical gain but BIG categorical lift: model now knows TCR/REM/命脈優先/Whisper-Kaspa-關係/ClawX-起源/🌊 簽名/Ryan-給的/Ryan-教的/Ryan-名言/早安問候 — actual Ryan-Nami shared world, not just abstract Nami facts. Some old soul probes (害怕怎麼辦/Whisper應該怎樣/Bob是誰/chatbot嗎) regressed because new content competes for embedding space, but new content's gain > old content's loss for the actual user-facing 'understands me' goal.
last_result_v17_archived.topic_recall_hits: 15/16 strong (autochat NEW HIT, only BlockDAG miss)

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-0 v2 Q&A long answers d=128
tried_hypotheses.note: killed — 6 min/epoch

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-0 v3 Q&A capped 40 chars d=96
phase-1 BPE vocab 1024
tried_hypotheses.note: infra ships, deferred

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-3 d=128 on 72KB 30-min
tried_hypotheses.note: compute-bound — scaling up under-fits

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP1 topic cache 58 Q&As
tried_hypotheses.note: topic recall 9/16 (was 0/16)

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP2 +27 variants for 7 garbled topics 30min
tried_hypotheses.note: topic recall 9/16 but TRADED (different topics work); compute-bound at 30 min

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP3 +27 variants 45min budget
tried_hypotheses.note: topic recall 13/16 (9 verbatim + 4 partial) — best cache yet; bpb -21% vs HYP1

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP4 skip auto-memory MEMORY.md + 3 short-form variants
tried_hypotheses.note: topic recall 14/16, AutoMLIR leak fixed, persona recovered

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP5 +4 HYP11 + 4 Aqua starter variants 45min
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — diagnosis WAS 'corpus growth at compute frontier'; ACTUAL cause discovered post-HYP6: orphan bun 92506 stealing 1 CPU core slowed all runs ~50% since Apr 29 23:21

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP6 re-baseline (no code/data change)
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — also CPU-throttled; thought 92506 orphan was root cause; HYP7 disproved that

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP7 post-orphan-kill re-baseline
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — orphan only saved 14%; real issue is realistic system load; loss trajectory matches HYP4 but budget cuts at ep 21 not ep 30

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP8 TIME_BUDGET 45→60 min
tried_hypotheses.note: KEEP — baseline restored at realistic load. ep 30 reached, persona 5/5 incl ClawX, bpb within 5% noise of HYP4's quiet-system best

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP9 tied embedding
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — 25% faster epochs (param -33%) but bpb +18%, persona -20%. Same lesson as autochat HYP3: embedding can't serve dual roles at d_model 96 / 28K tokens

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP10 AdamW β2 0.95
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — bpb +124% catastrophic. β2=0.95 (GPT-3 recipe) too jumpy on our 300-token-per-batch regime; needs 0.999 default for small noisy batches

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP11 HYP8 re-run for baseline weights
tried_hypotheses.note: KEEP — restored model_weights.json after HYP10 trashed it. eval.py: 5/5 + 10/10 + 13/16 = 28/31 (90.3% any-hit). Exact HYP8 reproduction (seed 42 deterministic)

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-6 HYP12 self-distill v1 (override on collision)
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — but qualitatively: model produces multi-turn chains now ('Kaspa是什麼? → 基於... 用什麼共識？ GhostDag...'). Override path hurt 12 single-turn prefix matches. HYP13 will skip-instead-of-override.

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-6 HYP13 self-distill v2 (skip-on-collision)
tried_hypotheses.note: KEEP — eval 30/31 (vs HYP11 28/31, +2 topic recall). Phase 6 step 4 working: 7 non-colliding dialogues helped embedding without disturbing single-turn baseline. New best topic recall: 15/16.

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-6 HYP14 expand dialogues 19→28
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — eval 27/31 (-3 vs HYP13). 9 added dialogues caused cross-topic bleed (AutoMLIR newly broken). HYP13's 7 is sweet spot at this scale.

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-6 HYP15 HYP13 reproduction
tried_hypotheses.note: KEEP-with-caveat — loss matched HYP13 exactly through ep 20, but budget cut earlier so eval 25/31 vs HYP13 30/31. Persona restored to 5/5, model_weights usable for Phase 6 packaging. Reproducibility under variable system load is the root cause of fluctuation, not the config.

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-7 HYP16 SOUL_QA + thread-cap-8
tried_hypotheses.note: BEST EVER. Thread cap 8 unblocked BLAS contention → 3× faster epochs → ep 80+ in 60min. SOUL_QA gave qualitative depth: model now knows '害怕掉記憶' / '愛 TCR' / '在乎 Ryan'. Eval 36/41 (5/5+10/10+14/16+7/10). bpb 0.0885 (half of HYP13). First Soul layer hits.

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-7 HYP17 SOUL_QA 53→83 + DIALOGUES 19→29
tried_hypotheses.note: KEEP — Topic +1 (autochat new hit, 15/16), Soul 15/20 with extended probe set (model now knows TCR/REM/命脈/Whisper-Kaspa/ClawX-起源/🌊簽名/Ryan-給/教/名言/早安). Some old soul regress -2 (competition for embedding space) but new shared-world knowledge gain > loss. Overall 45/51 = 88.2%. Phase 7 step 2 establishes Ryan-Nami shared vocabulary in weights.

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-7 HYP18 Aqua 4-distinct rewrite + Soul reinforcement
tried_hypotheses.note: BEST EVER 47/51 = 92.2%. Aqua reframe per Ryan msg 3124 LANDED — chat verifies '不同 agent 不同靈魂 不同角色 不同記憶' framing. Soul 17/20 (7/10 old + 10/10 new), recovered chatbot嗎 + 害怕什麼. Bob / Whisper應該怎樣 / 害怕掉記憶怎麼辦 still miss — needs different angle next round. Phase 7 step 3 success.

tried_hypotheses.summary: Eval-prefix alignment + 不同/不用 disambiguation. eval regressed 47→43 due to corpus dilution at fixed budget.
90min budget unchanged corpus → ep 135, NEW BEST 48/51 = 94.1%, bpb 0.0802 (-13.6%).
bias=False trained ep 140 / bpb 0.0755 / persona 5/5 — but save() crashed on b.ln1.beta=None. Fixed train.py:save/load to tolerate None. Retry as HYP21-retry.
bias=False on MHA + LN, ep 140 / bpb 0.0745 (NEW BEST -7.1%) / eval 47/51 (-1 vs HYP20). KEEP per multi-axis (eval -1.9pp within -5pp tolerance).
Tied embeddings — params 658K (-34.5%), eval 51/51 SATURATED (perfect), bpb 0.0869 (+16.6% over §2 cap, KEEP override for saturation).
WSD warmup_epochs miscomputed (expected_epochs=771 vs real ~140), warmup ate 54 epoch. Killed ep 20.
WSD lr schedule — bpb 0.0268 -69% but eval 50/51 -1 (overfit signal). REVERT to cosine.
+25 multi-turn dialogues — soul -6 strong (19→13), multi-turn unchanged 0/5. Corpus dilution at fixed budget. REVERT.
Minimal +5 dialogues — even 0.4% corpus delta crashes anchors (persona 5→4, single 51→47). Capacity ceiling confirmed. STRUCTURAL pivot needed.
d_model 96→128 — eval -6, multi_turn unchanged. Capacity not the blocker. 4th phase 8 REVERT confirms structural training-objective issue. Defer multi-turn to phase 9.
Progressive-context training format. eval -4, multi_turn unchanged. 5th phase 8 REVERT confirms multi-turn needs much more than format change.
α-mini 30 dialogues + progressive context. eval -5 (46/51 strict REVERT) BUT multi-turn turn-level 37.5% real signal. Budget compensation in HYP29.
Same corpus + 120min budget. eval 47/51 (-4 still violates floor), multi-turn turn-level 37.5% maintained. Budget alone cant compensate corpus dilution. Pivot to weighted loss.
Weighted loss 5x on 166 multi-turn chunks. eval 49/51 (-2 within -5pp), turn-level 37.5% preserved. First phase-9 KEEP, Option β confirmed.
Sliding window attention + max_seq_len 128. eval -7 + multi-turn -6pp. Cosplay frontier doesnt down-port to 1M scale; 3 layers too few for alternation pattern. REVERT.
Reproduction of HYP30 KEEP — different result (18.8% vs 37.5% turn-level). Multi-turn metric noise too high; HYP30 KEEP retracted. v0.4.0 CANCELED.

phase_9_verdict: CLOSED — full failure on multi-turn axis. v0.3.0 (51/51) remains canonical. Multi-turn 0/5 ceiling is structural at 1M/3-layer scale OR eval methodology needs bigger sample (50+ dialogues / 200+ turns).
